original_image_tags: Scan of the reverse side of a document page, showing an off-white/aged paper surface with visible bleed-through of typed text from the front. There are two punch holes at the top, secured with a metal brad/fastener. At the bottom, there are multiple overlapping blue ink stamps. No clear primary text is legible on this side.

elements.description: Blue ink stamps at the bottom of a mostly blank page. Visible text includes 'RECEIVED', 'FEB 24 12 06 PM '49', 'RECORDS DIVISION', and inverted text reading 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE F.B.I.' with a partial date 'FEB 24 10 39 AM '49'.

judge.reason: Description B provides specific quoted text from the stamps that Description A explicitly states is not legible, creating a direct contradiction on whether verbatim text can be read.
